[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011111101 7
1 101111111 8
2 011111111 8
3 111111110 8
4 011111111 8
5 011110010 5
6 010101111 6
7 000110011 4

67 76 010111010 5
70 07 001001010 3
